description_long: This object is a head of broccoli with a dense, dome-shaped crown composed of tightly clustered green florets. The surface of the crown is uneven and bumpy, with small, rounded buds forming a textured appearance. The stalk is thick, pale green to yellowish, and tapers slightly toward the base, showing some branching and knobby protrusions. There are a few small, leafy remnants attached near the lower part of the stalk, but no large leaves are present. The overall structure is compact, with the crown sitting firmly atop the central stalk. The coloration transitions from deep green at the crown to lighter green and yellowish hues along the stalk.
description: A dense, green broccoli head with a bumpy floret crown and a thick, pale stalk, showing compact structure and subtle color variation.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded, dense floret crown and a straight, thick stalk with minimal leaf remnants.
description_view_1: This side view reveals more of the stalk's branching and knobby texture, with the crown slightly angled.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the full width of the crown and the tapering stalk, with visible branching at the base.
description_view_3: Another side view, showing the crown's dense surface and the stalk's irregular base with some leafy remnants.
attribute_floret_clustering: Florets are densely packed across the crown, with minimal visible gaps and slight variation in floret size, creating a compact, continuous surface.
attribute_stalk_segmentation: The stalk appears mostly continuous with a few prominent nodes and knobby protrusions near the base, but no clear segmentation into distinct sections.
attribute_branching_pattern: Branching is irregular, with several short, thick primary branches extending from the main stalk to support the crown; secondary branching is minimal and asymmetrical.
attribute_leaf_attachment: A few small leaf remnants are attached near the base of the stalk, oriented outward; no large leaves are present along the stalk or crown.
attribute_crown_density: The crown is solid and highly dense, with tightly packed florets and no significant open areas or gaps visible.
